title: rhamnus × intermedia
intro: Rhamnus × intermedia, also known as Frangula alnus, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Rhamnus cathartica and Rhamnus frangula, both belonging to the buckthorn family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its laxative and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rhamnus × intermedia include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures, teas, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
